title: HackerOne AI Red Teaming
description: Adversarial testing of agentic AI systems using human researchers and autonomous AI agents to identify prompt injection,  tool misuse, privilege escalation, and goal manipulation across agent workflows and retrieval pipelines.

items: Available Agent Scanning, Adversarial red-teaming: goal drift, prompt injection, hallucination chaining, & over-permissioned tool usage.
Multi-agent scenario simulations for collusion, misalignment, or deception detection.
Validate agent decisions against expected goal plans.
